creator: ny2007ltd@gmail.com
text:
Please add into WWW of FreeBSD into section "Open issues"
inside FreeBSD 12, FreeBSD 13, FreeBSD 14 short information:
-----------------------------------------------------------

FreeBSD TCP/PPP-server implementation not have classic PPPD anymore.
It is using MPD5 daemon to make TCP/PPP-server.
At same time MPD5 TCP/PPP server is broken starting from FreeBSD 12.
It is still broken in FreeBSD versions 12, 13 and 14. 
There is no any alternate solution for PPPD server in FreeBSD now.

Related bug: 272319.
